---
title: "Chapter 9 Practice"
output: html_notebook
---


## Load Data

I am learning how to load data that is placed in a data folder. I need to make sure I have the correct file path. 

```{r}
# Library First
library(readr)

# Load data
dplace_df <- read_csv("data/Values_Transport_dplace.csv")
```


YAY! It Loaded!


## Workflow

Always open R by opening the file and clicking the Project. 

1. Click Pull FIRST

2. Do work in your project as usual

3. When you have done enough work to feel like you need a back up, Stage and Commit

Stage: 

1. click SAVE! Make the red name of your file black.

2. Then stage by clicking the boxes in Git Tab. 

3. Then click comit
